0._value: I heard that #p207# in #m10001000# is very sick...

1._value: A girl named #p207# in #m10001001# has been ill for a long time. It looks like she can't live a normal life at all. I agreed to help her. #b#t4031009##k... What a strange name! She says she'll get a little better by taking that... I should go to #m10000000# and see this guy #b#p102##k...

2._value: #p207# wanted me to go see #p102# of Lith Harbor, so I did just that. He promised to give me the #t4031009# only after I get him a #b#t4031011##k. Geez, he won't even give any free medicine for a sick girl?

0._value: Cough... cough... Oh, hello stranger. Sorry, but may I ask you for a favor? I've been sick for a while, and the doctors can't do anything. Lately, it has gotten so bad I can't even take care of myself.

1._value: Is there any way you can get me some #b#t4031009##k? I am not sure exactly how to get that, but #b#p102##k from #b#m10000000##k may know a thing or two about it. Please help me. Cough, cough... Pardon me.

0._value: Did you need something from me? Hmm, #t4031009#?
You haven't met up with #b#p102##k yet? #p102# from #b#m10000000##k can definitely help you find some #t4031006#. Please... Talk to him for me...
